title: Open work permit for those affected by crisis or disaster - Canada.ca
content:
## You need a work permit
Based on your answers, you may be eligible for an open work permit (OWP) .

## Eligibility requirements
You may be eligible to apply for an OWP under a temporary public policy if you’ve been affected by a conflict, crisis, natural hazard or other situations in and outside Canada.
Find out if you’re eligible for these temporary measures.
